title: Policy Analyst

rationales.taskAutomation: Literature review, data analysis, and memo drafting make up most of the visible output and are automatable at a high reliability today.
rationales.toolMaturity: LLM-based research-synthesis and drafting tools are mature and widely used for exactly this kind of document-heavy analytical work.
rationales.adoption: Government policy shops lag private-sector think tanks and consultancies in rolling these tools into daily workflows, though usage is spreading.
rationales.agenticExposure: Research-summarize-draft is close to the canonical agent-ownable workflow, leaving final recommendation and political judgment as the human core.

tasksAtRisk: Data analysis and chart generation for briefs
First-draft policy memo and briefing-document writing
tasksGrowing: Briefing decision-makers and answering follow-up questions
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 19-3099, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: AI research-synthesis and drafting tool fluency

insight: One of the highest-automation roles in this category: the drafting and research pipeline is squarely inside what agentic tools do well today.
